archetype.name: Wrestler
archetype.note: This archetype offers Crushing Grab at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Zombie
archetype.note: This archetype offers Crushing Grab at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Crushing Grab
feat.text: Like a powerful constrictor, you crush targets in your unyielding grasp. When you successfully Grapple a creature, you can deal bludgeoning damage to that creature equal to your Strength modifier. You can make this attack nonlethal with no penalty.

traits.name: Monk
traits.text: Abilities with this trait are from the monk class. A weapon with this trait is primarily used by monks.

sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
